title: Sour Silky Filipino Chicken Roast
description: A show-stopping Filipino dish featuring lemongrass and a mediterranean twist, this sour and silky chicken roast is sure to impress. The combination of citrus, herbs, and spices creates a truly unique flavor profile.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine lemongrass, lime juice, olive oil, fish sauce, honey, garlic, black pepper, and salt. Blend until smooth.
Place the chicken in a large bowl and pour the marinade over it, making sure the chicken is fully coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it in a roasting pan.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for about 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 75°C (165°F).
Baste the chicken with the pan juices every 20 minutes to keep it moist and promote even browning.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
